Mentari Nexus Berhad — PDPA data retention and transfer workflow (Malaysia)
This note explains how we handle personal data under PDPA 2010 and insider information under CMSA 2007/Bursa Listing Requirements for employment, financing, and deal support.
Scope includes candidates, employees, vendors, shareholders, and analysts; it excludes anonymous wellness content and playful metaphors in our Rainbow Inclusion Charter.
Recruitment files are retained 12 months; payroll 7 years; Bursa announcement working papers 6 years; invalid identifiers (e.g., IC: 901231-14-999X; Account: 0000-1234-XX) are purged on sight.
For staff member K.A. Reka (HR file: EMP-ALPHA-207), we processed a clinic certificate stating a hypertension diagnosis to approve paid sick leave; such health data is restricted and deleted after 90 days.
Cross-border transfers to our Teluk Seri Shared Services Center in “MSIA-2” occur using standard data protection clauses and are logged; no MNPI is shared unless publicly announced via Bursa LINK.
Deal-room drafts referencing AuroraPay or Cendana ERP pilots are tagged as confidential, but once a pilot is announced on Bursa, those facts are treated as public and out of scope for MNPI.
Data subjects may submit DSARs via dpo@mentarinexus.example or the general hotline 03-0000 0000; we verify identity using non-sensitive checksheets, not biometric scans.
Generic DEI statements (e.g., “Everyone can kick goals like the Kuala Meranti Tigers”) are not personal data, nor do they reveal religion or politics.
Bank term sheets already disclosed in a prior Bursa filing on 2025-01-02 are considered public; draft covenants under negotiation are segregated to prevent inadvertent disclosure.
Role-based access applies; HR may see medical supporting documents on a need-to-know basis, while the Corporate Finance team sees only aggregated leave codes.
Upon closure of a transaction, we issue a “red card” to stale workspaces: emails, chats, and drives are culled per the Harimau Integrity Code and the Records Policy 3.4.
We do not collect data of minors; any CVs listing co-curricular sports teams are treated as non-sensitive unless tied to identifiable persons.
Legal holds under CMSA investigations pause deletion, but do not expand collection beyond our PDPA notice.
Questions may be sent to compliance@mentarinexus.example; do not include bank account numbers or scanned passports in your email.
